Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed following SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases that end with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Agreed when preceded by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and Manuscript Export Succeeded in revised submission phases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include multiple reviewer agreements before reaching a decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Agreed and the end of the case

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after Unassign Reviewer
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unassign Reviewer' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to the final EIC decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to the subsequent Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases where the variant includes SW-Reviewer No Response prior to agreement
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and the next AE-related activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in accepted manuscripts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'", 'aggregation': 'average'}"
